# services.ssh-agent-switcher

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.ssh-agent-switcher`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.ssh-agent-switcher.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ssh-agent-switcher, a daemon that proxies SSH agent connections to forwarded agents. This allows tmux/screen sessions to access SSH agents across reconnections. This is a per-user service that automatically starts when you log in via SSH and sets SSH_AUTH_SOCK to point to a stable socket location. Note: This only activates for SSH sessions, not graphical or console logins. |
| `services.ssh-agent-switcher.package` | `package` | The ssh-agent-switcher package to use. |
